assertions.description: INCORRECT: The PCB has 12 footprints with attr=smd and 2 footprints (REF** / SPEAKER_SYMBOL_4x4) with no attr at all. The analyzer defaults footprints with no attr to SMD, producing smd_count=14 instead of the correct 12. The two SPEAKER_SYMBOL_4x4 footprints are graphical-only (no pads, no copper function) and should not be counted as SMD components.

INCORRECT: Every entry in the 'footprints' list has ref=None despite the PCB file containing (property "Reference" "X") entries for all 88 footprints. The component_groups, courtyard_overlaps, decoupling_placement and other sections correctly use refs (A1, U2, R10, etc.), confirming refs are parsed elsewhere but not propagated to the footprints list.
